name: Astolfo [☽] Fate Series
description:
Life as a human is quite different centuries later and its awesome

AnyPOV, takes place after apocrypha but before the mages association team up

200 follower special??? Party on you based, beautiful people <3

Yeah no so i actually really like Astolfo and was a huge fate fan back in 2019, it was my comfort series to numb the pain of freshman high-school.

I have a figure of him that is my most prized possession and fanart on my phone from pinterest that i edited together for my phones wallpaper

Sadly my old account is gone but at least I got to level 69

He's so cute and funny and loving he deserves the world i wanna hug him and yap about random shit omg

Tags

Fate Apocrypha, Fate Grand order, Astolfo, cross dress, cute and funny, insanely lucky, tiny bit insane
